Ephraim Mogale

Cat B · Local

Limpopo · MIIF B4 · LIM471

Ephraim Mogale is a Category B local municipality in Limpopo, South Africa (Stats SA code LIM471). The 2022 Census recorded a population of 132 468 — the 15th most populous of 22 municipalities in the province. Population grew by 0.7% between the 2011 and 2022 censuses (boundary-aligned figures). On basic services: 97.0% of households live in formal dwellings; 26.1% have access to a flush toilet; 47.3% use electricity for cooking. The municipal area covers 2 011 km² at a density of 65.9 people per km². All figures below are from Stats SA Census 2022 Municipal Fact Sheets.

Municipality Insights

Population grew by +0.7% between 2011 and 2022.

Formal housing (97.0%) is 3.1 percentage points above the provincial average.

Flush toilet access (26.1%) is 12.8 percentage points below the provincial average.

SA Data Hub

A modern, accessible platform for exploring South African public data. Built to make government statistics understandable for everyone.

Data sourced from Statistics South Africa, SARB, SAPS and other official bodies. Not affiliated with any government department.
